title: Exploratorium (San Francisco) - Visitor Information & Reviews
content: The Exploratorium is a museum of science, technology, and arts in San Francisco, United States. It is characterized as a 'mad scientist's playground, a scientific funhouse, and an experimental laboratory, all in one.' The participatory nature of its exhibits and its self-identification as a center for informal learning has led it to be cited as the prototype for participatory museums worldwide. #**2** Science & Technology in San Francisco   #**3** Contemporary art museums in San Francisco   #**1** Industrial & heritage museums in San Francisco   #**5** Science & Technology in California   #**1** Astronomy museums in California   #**5** Contemporary art museums in California   #**3** Geology museums in California   #**1** Industrial & heritage museums in California   #**24** Science & Technology in United States   #**5** Astronomy museums in United States   #**21** Contemporary art museums in United States   #**7** Geology museums in United States   #**11** Industrial & heritage museums in United States. The Exploratorium in San Francisco is a highly regarded science museum that offers a hands-on, interactive experience for visitors of all ages.

title: San Francisco: Exploratorium Ticket - 700+ Hands-On Exhibits
